sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98651" key="sumperipi/ptw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπερι-πίπτω</orth>, <sense id="n98651.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fall about together</tr_>, Hypsaeus ap.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.31.45</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
